top_signals.title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Thunder get past Spurs, level series 1-1
top_signals.summary: The Thunder never trailed after ‌the ‌first quarter, though the game wasn't decided until the closing minutes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
